name: Marumae Co.,Ltd.
summary: Marumae Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and processes precision machinery and mechanical parts. The company offers liquid crystal manufacturing and semiconductor manufacturing equipment. It also provides CVD equipment parts, nuclear fuel containers, power generation turbine rotor/stationary blades, cases for communication base stations, plasma CVD equipment parts for exterior, etc. that are used in the fields of solar cells, nuclear power, thermal/steam power generation, communications, optics, motorbike, aerospace, and others. In addition, the company designs, manufactures, and sells industrial, as well as medical machinery and equipment. Further, it develops and sells software products; engages in the canned and piping construction activities; offers transportation services; and leases real estate properties. The company was founded in 1965 and is based in Izumi, Japan.
